llm_eval.notes: C13 repo-local plan lock lifecycle。py_compile OK、test_system_plan_lock/test_runtimeがacquire/renew/release/expired cleanup/env独立をexercise。frontmatter完備(write-scope:.dev-graph/locks only)。設計良: 固定lock名+O_EXCLで異run間排他を保証(docstringで一名一runのrace回避理由を明記)、O_NOFOLLOW+_assert_no_symlinksで全symlink成分拒否、fcntl.flock操作guardでlifecycle直列化、lock schemaをexact field-set+RFC3339 tz+acquired<=heartbeat<expires順序で厳格検証、validate_active_lock()はC11向けread-only境界でsole-writer原則維持、cleanup_expired_lockはunlink前に再readしinspect後変化したlockを削除しない、renewでclock regression guard、expired receiptはcollision検出付き冪等。DomainBlock(exit1)/ContractError(exit2)分離明快。減点smell: fcntl依存でPOSIX限定(Windows非対応)、_acquireが毎回legacy per-run名をglob。重大欠陥なし
